name: Anise Cookies # 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Beat eggs and sugar together until well combined.
3. Sift flour, salt, and baking powder into a bowl. Gradually add to the egg mixture, stirring continuously.
4. Blend in vanilla, lemon rind, and anise seed. Mix until smooth.
5. Spoon batter into a greased, long (about 12") poundcake tin, filling each compartment about two-thirds full.
6. Bake for approximately 40 minutes, or until lightly browned.
7. Slice warm cookies into 1/3 inch pieces using a sharp knife.
8. Place slices on a large baking sheet and toast in the oven until golden brown, turning over to toast other side. Makes about 20 cookies.
